title: Tape 17: Pinewatch - Confrontation and Reckoning Arc Key Art
prompt: Story: Tape 17: Pinewatch (tape-17-pinewatch) | Hook: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight. | Subgenre: found-footage investigation | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels | Villain: The Editor | Villain worldview: Reality is editable if fear is timed correctly. | Motifs: timecode burn-ins, camera clicks, forest sirens. Arc focus: Confrontation and Reckoning (ENDGAME). Summary: The final branch depends on ethics, timing, and trust.. Create cinematic key art with readable clue anchors and escalating threat language.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
